visual_features.overall_style: Clean, modern, minimalist layout with a light, corporate feel rather than a cozy cafe look. Strong use of a single brand blue on a white background, flat design with subtle rounded corners and almost no decorative elements.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is driven by size, weight, and color. The logo and top navigation sit in a thin header but visually recede due to smaller size and light weight. The main focal point is the bold centered 'Welcome!' heading, followed by the explanatory subtext, then the email/password form fields. The primary blue 'Sign In' button is the most visually prominent element because of its saturated color and full-width block shape. Secondary links ('Forgot Password?', 'Sign Up') are smaller, lower contrast, and placed below the primary action to clearly signal lesser priority.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Very generous whitespace around the central form, with large left/right margins and ample vertical spacing between the header, heading, form fields, and footer links. Elements are not crowded; each block (header, title, form, footer message) has clear breathing room. This produces a low-density, airy layout that focuses the user on the login task.
unique_elements: Brand coffee-shop logo at top-left with detailed illustration (cup + banner), contrasting slightly with the otherwise minimal interface.
Centered pill-style 'Find a location' control in the header acting as a secondary CTA distinct from the login form.
Blue square icon button at top-right (likely cart or account), visually echoing the primary CTA color but in a compact, icon-only format.

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Implicit 12-column grid with a centered content column constrained to a fixed max-width (~420–480px). Header uses a three-part horizontal layout (left, center, right) aligned to the same page margins.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Centered single-column layout within a full-width page. Thin top header bar, then vertically stacked content: heading, description, form, auxiliary links.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: 1) Header row with logo left, 'Back' text link near the logo, center-aligned 'Find a location' pill, and an icon button on the right. 2) Main login section centered vertically in the remaining viewport: title, subtitle, stacked email and password fields, primary CTA button, secondary 'Forgot Password?' link, dividing line, then 'Sign Up' prompt. 3) The rest of the page is clean background with no additional sections.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Global layout is horizontally centered. Header content is horizontally distributed (left/center/right) along a baseline. Inside the form block, labels and fields are left-aligned while the overall block is centered on the page. Text in headings is center-aligned; form labels and input placeholders are left-aligned. Buttons use centered text.
responsive_hints: Single-column main content ensures straightforward stacking on smaller screens.
Centered fixed-width form suggests max-width with auto margins, which naturally adapts for larger and smaller viewports.
Header items spaced left/center/right imply a flex-based layout that can wrap or stack vertically on narrow screens.
Large left/right whitespace acts as a fluid margin that can shrink on mobile while preserving readability.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Strong linear top-to-bottom flow: header bar at the top (logo and navigation line), then a centered title block ('Welcome!' + instruction), then a stacked vertical form (Email label, email input, Password label, password input), followed by a full-width primary CTA button. Below the button is a single secondary link ('Forgot Password?'), then a thin horizontal rule, and finally a short line of text with an inline 'Sign Up' link. Everything is contained within a narrow central column, with no sidebars or multi-column content within the main section.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: The upper header occupies a relatively small vertical slice (~10–15% of viewport height). The central login column occupies the middle band with generous top and bottom padding, visually dominating the experience while still leaving significant white space above and below. The form fields and button take up most of the width of the central column, with consistent horizontal padding inside inputs and buttons. Footer text and links at the bottom of the form use smaller vertical spacing, taking minimal space and reinforcing their lower priority.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Spacious, low-density layout with large margins around the central content and comfortable vertical spacing between elements (labels, inputs, button, links). The design deliberately shows only essential elements for login, avoiding any promotional or additional content. There is no visible clutter; the user sees a small amount of information at once, simplifying decision-making.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: Primarily a strong vertical flow centered in the page. Eye path: logo and 'Back' on the left of the top bar, then naturally to the centered 'Find a location' control, then down to the bold 'Welcome!' headline in the central column. From there the user moves downward to the instruction text, then left-aligned email and password fields, then to the large blue 'Sign In' button. After noticing the button, the eye continues downward to the 'Forgot Password?' link and finally to the 'Don't have an account? Sign Up' message. The large blue button serves as the main visual anchor.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Primary button ('Sign In') is a wide rectangular block with moderately rounded corners (~4–6px radius), solid primary blue fill (#0052CC), and white center-aligned text in a medium to semibold weight. Height appears around 44–48px with generous horizontal padding (though width is constrained by the form column, not content width). No visible border besides the fill color; flat design with no or extremely subtle shadow. The 'Find a location' button at the top is a pill-shaped outline button: full rounding (20+px radius), white background, 1px blue border, blue text and icon, and slightly smaller height than the primary button. The icon-only button at the top-right is a small square (roughly 40x40px) with full blue fill and a white line icon centered inside, with slightly rounded corners.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Primary button best represented as a native <button> element with a class for size and style, often full-width within a flex or block container: <button class='btn btn-primary btn-block'>Sign In</button>. The 'Find a location' control could be a <button> or an <a> styled as a button (e.g., <a class='btn btn-outline-primary'>). Icon-only button likely <button class='btn-icon'> with an inline <svg> or <i> element.

ui_patterns.visual_description: There is no explicit card, but the central form area reads visually as a loose card region created by alignment and whitespace rather than a bordered box. Inputs and the primary button stack to form a vertical strip with subtle borders and occasional horizontal rules (like the thin line above 'Don't have an account?'). No outer shadow, container border, or background block is visible; separation is achieved purely via spacing and alignment.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: If implemented as a card, it would likely be a <div class='auth-card'> wrapper with padding applied, inside which resides the title, subtitle, and <form>. Internally: heading, paragraph, then grouped <div class='form-group'> blocks. No explicit header/footer structure beyond the order of elements.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Form fields are full-width text inputs with light gray borders (#DDDDDD), slightly rounded corners (~4px), and white backgrounds. They use left-aligned placeholder text in a medium gray (#777777) with regular weight. Labels ('Email', 'Password') are placed clearly above the inputs, left-aligned, and slightly smaller or same size as body text but with darker color (#333333). Vertical spacing between label and field is tight (4–8px), with more space between individual field groups (~16–24px). The form appears low-density with good breathing room. There is a thin, subtle horizontal divider line (#E0E0E0) separating the 'Forgot Password?' link from the 'Don't have an account? Sign Up' text.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Header navigation is very minimal. Left side: small coffee-shop logo circle plus the word 'Back' with a left arrow icon in blue. Center: pill-outline 'Find a location' button, which visually stands out as a secondary action. Right: a compact blue icon-only button. All elements are horizontally aligned and spaced, with sufficient padding from the top and edges. No visible hover styles in the image, but likely color or underline changes. Overall character is light and unobtrusive, keeping focus on the login form.

ui_patterns.visual_description: No explicit lists or repeated list items are visible. The only sequential items are vertically stacked form fields and links, which resemble a simple, low-density vertical list with generous spacing and no bullet or numbering. Separators are either pure whitespace or a single light horizontal rule.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: When lists are required in this design system, they would likely be implemented as simple vertical flex containers (<ul> or <div> with <li> or child <div>s) with left-aligned content, minimal decoration, and possibly subtle horizontal separators in light gray.

heading.visual_style: Bold, neutral sans-serif with moderate stroke contrast and rounded terminals, giving a contemporary but not overly stylized feel. The 'Welcome!' heading appears slightly heavier and larger than body text, still clean and functional.

body.visual_style: Clean, humanist sans-serif with good legibility, moderate x-height, and neutral personality suitable for transactional UI.

spacing_system.component_padding: Inputs and buttons use approximately 12–16px vertical padding and 16–24px horizontal padding internally, aligning to 8px multiples. The header and central column likely use 24–32px top/bottom padding.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical spacing between major blocks (title to subtext, subtext to first field, button to 'Forgot Password?', divider to 'Sign Up' text) appears to follow a 16–32px rhythm, often 24px between primary groups.

interaction_hints: Buttons likely have hover states: primary button darkens slightly or adds subtle shadow; outline button ('Find a location') may switch to filled blue or lightly tint the background; icon-only button may change background intensity.
Text links such as 'Back', 'Forgot Password?', and 'Sign Up' probably underline or change color to a darker or lighter blue on hover, with cursor change to pointer.
Form inputs may show a blue border and possibly a subtle glow when focused, along with keyboard focus outlines to maintain accessibility.
Transitions would be subtle and fast (150–200ms) with easing (e.g., ease-out) applied to hover/focus color changes and button states, maintaining the clean, professional feel.

Micro-interactions might include small validation messages appearing beneath fields on error, with border color changing to semantic red and a light shake animation avoided in favor of a more restrained appearance.
